free_text: Angle and energy distributions of charged particles
from the high -energy nuclear bombardment of various
elements
Thesis
Experiment performed at 184-inch
synchrocyclotron
Polyethylene (CH2)n sample with areal density of
3.85mg/cm2
The secondaries were detected in Ilford C.2
nuclear track plates with dimensions 1-inch by
3-inches with thickness of 200 mu-m. Track plates
were located inside the 184-inch synchrocyclotron
tank, and secondaries were identified through their
curvature in the cyclotrons magnetic field, their
range in emulsion, and their gap or grain density.
Compiled by S.H.
